## Summary

Describe the problem and the approach taken.

## Verification

- [ ] Unit or integration tests added or updated where needed
- [ ] `python3 -m ruff check cai tests`
- [ ] `python3 -m mypy cai tests`
- [ ] `python3 -m compileall -q cai tests`
- [ ] `python3 -m unittest`
- [ ] `cai --help`
- [ ] Documentation updated for user-facing changes

## Risk

Call out compatibility changes, new permissions, filesystem effects, provider
behavior changes, or security considerations.
